pageDescription: Calculate pregnancy conception  with our free online calculator

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides pregnancy conception  estimates only

importantNotesList: This is an estimate and should not replace professional advice
Results may vary based on individual factors
Use consistent units for accurate results

messages.enterInformation: Enter the required information to calculate pregnancy conception

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides pregnancy conception  estimates based on standard methods. Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized advice and detailed information, consult with professionals who can provide guidance based on individual needs and circumstances.
